RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0007 Page 1 of 3 Statement of Account Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 02/01/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 820 3,617 12/06/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - 1,981 5,598 26/05/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - 1,506 7,104 10/07/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 715 1,542 7,931 25/05/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - - 7,931 06/01/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - 2,144 10,075 22/07/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - - 10,075 21/04/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - - 10,075 14/11/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 847 - 9,228 13/05/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 9,228 20/02/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - - 9,228 05/02/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 447 - 8,781 19/02/2025 UTILITY BILL - 892 9,673 16/05/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 739 - 8,934 06/11/2025 UTILITY BILL - 1,520 10,454 13/06/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - 1,035 11,489 11/10/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 11,489 07/03/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - - 11,489
